description: Answer key for SPARQL-based capability inspection of five RDF-based representation combinations.

queries.question: Does the model preserve the RDFS document class hierarchy from progress-payment documents down to the progress-payment statement?
Does the model represent the four subdocuments of the progress-payment statement?
Does the model preserve concrete, rebar, and formwork/shoring work-type sections across summary, detail, and quantity sheets?
Does the model connect BoQ items and quantity-calculation items through shared specification objects?
Does the model expose a cost-basis path from cost items to the reinforced-concrete summary amount?
Does the model include a SKOS concept scheme with top concepts for documents, work types, detail categories, and specifications?
Does the model manage reinforced-concrete work-type vocabulary using SKOS broader/narrower relations?
Does the model map document-type concepts to ontology classes using SKOS mapping properties?
Does the model provide controlled labels and alternative labels for specification concepts?
Does the model connect work-type and specification instances to SKOS concepts?
Does the model declare an OWL ontology extension?
Does the model define inverse properties for containment, quantity basis, and aggregation relations?
Does the model define transitive properties for work-type hierarchy and cost-basis dependency?
Does the model include a property chain axiom for traceable summary evidence?
Does the model use lightweight OWL someValuesFrom restrictions suitable for OWL 2 RL-style inference?
Does the model define TraceableBoQItem as an equivalent class using an intersection of BoQ, quantity-basis, aggregation, and specification restrictions?
Does the model define an OWL key for BoQ item identity based on source file, sheet, and row number?
Does the model define Specification as a disjoint union of concrete, rebar, formwork, and steel-shape specifications?
Does the model express exact datatype cardinalities for concrete mix strength, slump, and aggregate size?
Does the model express exact datatype cardinalities for rebar steel grade and bar diameter?
Does the model express OWL restrictions that a progress-payment statement contains the four required subdocument types?
Does the model define a SHACL shape for required progress-payment statement metadata?
Does the model define SHACL required field and datatype checks for BoQ item literals?
Does the model require BoQ items to have specification objects, quantity basis, and summary aggregation targets?
Does the model define required fields for quantity-calculation items?
Does the model define SHACL shapes for concrete mix, rebar specification, and formwork specification objects?
Does the model include a SHACL SPARQL constraint for current quantity times unit price equals amount?
Does the model include a SHACL SPARQL constraint for material, labor, and expense amount reconciliation?
Does the model include a SHACL SPARQL constraint for quantity-basis unit conversion such as kg to ton?
Does the model include a SHACL SPARQL constraint that direct cost matches the reinforced-concrete summary basis?
Does the model define a BoQ table format with required item name, specification, unit, current quantity, unit price, and amount fields?
Do all BoQ items preserve source sheet, source row, source cell address, hierarchy path, work-type label, and detail-category label?
Does the SKOS extension cover detail-category concepts and map them to ontology classes?
Does the SKOS extension provide Korean preferred labels and synonym or multilingual alternative labels for key work and detail concepts?
Does the OWL extension type core traceability relations as object properties and value fields as datatype properties?
Does the OWL extension express disjointness among concrete, rebar, formwork, and steel-shape specification classes?
Does the OWL 2 DL extension express exact datatype cardinalities for BoQ unit, current quantity, and amount?
Does the OWL 2 DL extension require each quantity-calculation item to be a basis for at least one BoQ item?
Does the SHACL extension validate that the progress-payment statement contains one cost sheet, one summary sheet, one detail sheet, and one quantity sheet?
Does the SHACL extension validate required current amount, cumulative amount, and progress rate fields for summary amounts?
